ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team managing the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  "github_repo_url" TEXT /* GitHub repository URL for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the team */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team lead */,
  "lead_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team lead */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team lead (e.g., Project Manager, Technical Lead) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team lead is currently active */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the team lead joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "test_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., ready, in progress, completed) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test case is executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case the result belongs to */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test run the result is part of */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passing, pending, ignored, skipped, unsuccessful) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "tested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the test belongs to */,
  "test_runner" TEXT /* Test runner used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_tested_by FOREIGN KEY ("tested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the test run belongs to */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the test run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the test run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test run was conducted */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the test run belongs to */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken to execute the test run */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test run was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the history entry belongs to */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_run_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test run the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the history entry belongs to */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_history_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_run_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the aggregation belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the tests (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tests (e.g., passing, pending, ignored, skipped, unsuccessful) */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests */,
  "passing_tests" INTEGER /* Number of passing tests */,
  "pending_tests" INTEGER /* Number of pending tests */,
  "ignored_tests" INTEGER /* Number of ignored tests */,
  "skipped_tests" INTEGER /* Number of skipped tests */,
  "unsuccessful_tests" INTEGER /* Number of unsuccessful tests */,
  "aggregation_date" TEXT /* Date the aggregation was generated */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the aggregation belongs to */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the aggregated tests */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the tests were executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_aggregations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
